caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a matching green t-shirt is seated in a studio environment, speaking into a black microphone on a boom arm. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in a stylized, white, distressed font. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and clothing racks are visible. Two logos appear on screen: one is a black circular emblem with "DRIP" and "TORT" written inside, and the other is a red "DRIP TORT" logo. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his expression from a neutral speaking face to closing his eyes and tilting his head back, eventually leaning forward and bringing his hands together in front of him while continuing to speak.
